mapper.select: SELECT HOMPI_ID AS hompiId, ALBUM_ID AS albumId, ALBUM_IMG AS albumImage, ALBUM_TITLE AS albumTitle, ALBUM_CONTENT AS albumContent, AVAIL_STATUS AS availStatus, FOLDER_ID AS folderId, INSERT_USER_ID AS userId FROM HOMPI_ALBUM WHERE HOMPI_ID = #{hompiId} AND AVAIL_STATUS = 31 ORDER BY ALBUM_ID ASC LIMIT 1;
